programme.title: Hawaii
programme.desc: Hawaii island-hopping: Lava exploration on the Big Island by land and sea with local teens, muddy ATV ride in Kauai, and cultural insights at a lively luau. A week of thrilling adventures and Hawaiian traditions!

programme.title: The Dam
programme.desc: Kit must shut down the hydroelectric plant to save Mr. Battery before he is chopped in the dam's turbine.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Darwin gets lost in his work, Newts comes up with a plan to help him keep track of time.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met...an Ant
programme.desc: Today Henry meets an Ant in an ant farm. Henry becomes a tiny Worker Ant to help Ant get back to the rest of his colony in the garden.

programme.title: How Do Satellites Help Us Navigate?
programme.desc: Early pioneers explored the world using mathematics to navigate by the sun and the stars. By measuring their relation to key points on Earth, they could travel great distances. But how did mathematics help us make the jump into the age of satellite navigation?

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: One Step From Stardom
programme.desc: The Icicles compete at the British Synchro Championships with their complicated new routine. But a rival team has set their sights on stealing the Icicles' crown. Ice hockey player Aren wants to follow in his older brother's footsteps.

programme.title: West Coast - Heading For Bird Island
programme.desc: Trying to find a shortcut to Bird Island, the youngsters end up stuck in a desolate dune field. Night falls and they encounter creatures that both scare and enthral them. They find a path to the coast and must cross a mighty river with the help of local fishermen.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Trip to Finland
programme.desc: While it's freezing outside, Zoe and Milo are warm inside. Alim arrives with a towel, ready for a bath in the icy puddle! Zoe and Milo are amazed! Alim takes them to Finland, where Aki shows them saunas and ice baths, proving Alim's point about the refreshing ice bath!

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Flippy's having the worst day-until a short-circuit at the cafe turns his world into a video game! Now he has three lives per level and total control. It's the escape he wanted... or is it? Even in games, you have to face challenges. What happens if he runs out of lives?

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Darwin gets lost in his work, Newts comes up with a plan to help him keep track of time.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Marvellous Medicine and First Aid
programme.desc: What's the best way to organise a first aid kit? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of medicine. Have hands-on fun by making a handy first aid kit, and get to know Al-Zahrawi, ‘the father of surgery' & inventor of a number of surgical instruments.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Piranha
programme.desc: Carol gets a special package from Brazil-a rare Chum Chum Land piranha needing protection. But it escapes and starts wreaking havoc on the town's ecosystem! Now, with everyone's help-and Flippy as bait-Carol must catch it before it devours everything in its path.

programme.title: Welcome to the Nok Civilisation
programme.desc: Famous artists known for their terracotta statuettes, the Noks were also excellent blacksmiths and incredible potters. And thanks to Howler's love of good food, they turned out to be honey experts and designers of innovative beehives...

programme.title: So Close
programme.desc: Amelie spends precious time with her family, while the Acrobatic gymnasts have a crucial competition and will have a chance to win a place at the World Championships in Belgium.

programme.title: Tough Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are facing tough challenges and unusual tasks. From swimming with critically endangered sharks to performing tricky surgery on a dog's knee, the kids are trying to prove they've got what it takes to care for unwell animals.

programme.title: Matching Socks
programme.desc: In this episode we explain the concept of 'probability'. How can we weigh all our possibilities to eventually pick the most likely outcome? In order to illustrate our options, Eric rearranges his messy sock drawer – blindfolded.

programme.title: Problem Solvers
programme.desc: The Junior Vets need to find out why Tino, the horse, can't walk properly. They help remove a large lump from the throat of Zoe, the Schnauzer dog. And Pollux, the alpaca, is going bald - can the Junior Vets get to the bottom of the problem?

programme.title: What Makes Chocolate so Tasty?
programme.desc: During roasting, a chemical reaction called the Maillard reaction changes the bitter taste of cocoa beans to the chocolate flavour we love. This reaction also creates the taste, smell and golden browning of toast, cakes, grilled and roasted meats.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester

E160 - Wolf's Airwalkers/Thanks, But No Fangs/I've Got Your Back
programme.desc: Wolf’s feet go flat after being chased by Wanda. Trico pumps them back up, but overinflates them: Wolf’s feet become so huge that he can walk on air. Predictably, he makes the most of this new-found ability to catch some sheep…

programme.title: E173 - Master Detective/The Avogodo/Hand Zombie/Employee Of The Month: Redux/Orangins
programme.desc: Robin uses his skills as a master detective to discover what happened to the animals that live outside Titans Tower.

programme.title: E1292 - Thumb War/Toddler Titans... Yay!/Huggbees/Baby Mouth/The Cast
programme.desc: As the other Titans engage in an all-out thumb-wrestling war, Starfire tries to broker peace.

programme.title: E27 - Don't Move/Muscle! Muscle! Muscle!
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found at the jewelry shop who has placed a new security system. Shiro and Deca must go inside. Will they be detected?

programme.title: E130 - What's The Time Mr Wolf?/Boxing Ring Hero/Tickle Tickle
programme.desc: One night, Wolf sleepwalks among the flock. Trico and Wanda try to guide him home, but he constantly puts himself in danger, obliging them each time to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Ben 10: Ben Gen 10 E1 -Ben 10: Ben Gen 10
programme.desc: When Ben meets a young Generator Rex on the run from Providence, he must work through a series of misunderstandings and defeat Hex in order to save the world from a malfunctioning Omnitrix infecting the human population with alien DNA.

programme.title: E126 - Neighbourly Bean/Nurse!
programme.desc: As Mr Bean settles down to watch his favourite TV programme he hears loud noises from next-door. He moves from house to garden but can’t escape the relentless cacophony of trumpets, electric drills, and screaming babies.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Dans la presse[Live]

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: In this first episode, Samira journeys to places rarely seen by western audiences to reveal how the Persian Empire was born, the mysterious writing of its early people and how Iran's powerful kings built a vast empire that became the envy of the ancient world.

programme.title: E2 - Building Your Empire
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world our ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength and protect their people. Who will build their way to glory?

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 1.8 million cherry chews are produced from just one single batch; massive silos of wheat are transformed into 'elbow' macaroni pasta; a continental cranberry cheesecake first started as a Christmas experiment; and meet chakri, the exotic southeast Asian snack that's hand-twirled and fried to crispy perfection.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Meet the worker bees who transform raw honey into liquid gold; a California bakery turns out 50,000 loaves of sprouted wheatbread; meet the cookie doctor behind a unique checkerboard creation; and it takes a team of experts to produce irresistible chocolate-covered cherries.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Twenty years ago, Sharon's identical twin vanished. Now, a young woman enters Sharon's life, claiming to be her sister's daughter and bringing with her a revelation that will upend Sharon's whole life.

programme.title: Love At First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sauteed in oil.

programme.title: E171
programme.desc: GBA Discovery visits the 9+2 cities in the GBA. It provides in-depth coverage of the landmarks, personalities and hotspots in the Greater Bay Area, and leads viewers to experience the prosperity and innovation of the GBA in a holistic manner, as well as the lesser-known stories.

programme.title: E426
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E1507
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.
SUMMARY OF PRESS: Providing a concise review of what's in the press, the show highlights the important news by presenting newspaper headlines and editorial from respected.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama

PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: E39
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E5 - Living Together
programme.desc: A complex web of relationships rules all life on earth: all species are interconnected, none can survive in isolation. While some relationships are one-sided, others are mutually beneficial. From loose associations to tight-knit partnerships, everything has a place in nature’s great scheme. Complex interactions between species are not even limited to animals, and some of the best examples occur in the lush mountain forests of Africa.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E5 - From Cloud to Coast
programme.desc: Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the island’s forests.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: E4 - Wales
programme.desc: Travel along the west coast of Great Britain, where the world’s longest uninterrupted footpath forges through more than 800 miles of breathtaking scenery. This majestic coast teems with wildlife, geological mysteries, and centuries of human history.

programme.title: E6 - Crocs and Hippos of Ndumo
programme.desc: The Nile crocodile and hippopotamus are two of Africa’s amphibious freshwater icons, found in waterways, rivers and lakes across the continent, including the stunning wilderness of Kwa-Zulu Natal in South Africa. These two species have co-existed for thousands of years, evolving in different ways to a life aquatic.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E5 - Ukraine
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers become the first people to trick at Chernobyl (and get a lifetime ban), but before they head out to their next stop, the two finish their trip just like they came in- airborne. Only this time they’re leaving by fighter jet.

After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E5 - Ukraine
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers become the first people to trick at Chernobyl (and get a lifetime ban), but before they head out to their next stop, the two finish their trip just like they came in- airborne. Only this time they’re leaving by fighter jet.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

E1105 - Pups Save The Director / Pups Save The Super Cows
programme.desc: Francois is directing a video about Mr. Porter's new line of pies. // Winnie Winnington's cow competitor Mooo-na Lisa and Bettina run away disguised as super heroes during the Super Farm Fair.

programme.title: E404 - Dojobot / A Shark's Life
programme.desc: Kai's Dojobot for training the Deer Squad is stolen by Baron Bite who turns it against them! // Lady Fluffpot spots a sea Monster whilst swimming at the beach!

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for 'later'.

programme.title: E103 - The Crew Builds An Ice Cream Shop / The Crew Fixes A Squeak
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: E104 - The Hunt For The Hidden Hive / The Trouble Of The Toppled Trees
programme.desc: Special agent Indie helps the pals reunite a lost bee with the rest of her hive. // Sam and Kit try to uncover who has been chewing down the forest trees.

programme.title: E404 - Dojobot / A Shark's Life
programme.desc: Kai's Dojobot for training the Deer Squad is stolen by Baron Bite who turns it against them! // Lady Fluffpot spots a sea Monster whilst swimming at the beach!

programme.title: E813 - Pups Save A Show Jumper
programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing rescued in a swamp.

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: E410 - Robots In Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: E109 - The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasur
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E404 - Dojobot / A Shark's Life
programme.desc: Kai's Dojobot for training the Deer Squad is stolen by Baron Bite who turns it against them! // Lady Fluffpot spots a sea Monster whilst swimming at the beach!

programme.title: E111 - The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: E1108 - Pups Get Your Goat / Pups Save The Crop Circles
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are observing a pair of mountain goats when a sudden avalanche strikes. // Farmer Al finds mysterious crop circles in his corn field, he calls on the Paw Patrol to find out more.

programme.title: E314 - Princess Peppa
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: E605 - Race To Sky High Mountain
programme.desc: At the starting line for Race to Sky High Mountain, one of Crusher's cheats threatens to sideline Blaze for good. To get back in this race, Blaze will need... Power Tires!

programme.title: E104 - The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: E502 - Pups Save Big Paw / Pups Save A Hum-Mover
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos' archeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the creature that may have taken it. // Mayor Humdinger pretends to break his toe in order to win a race, so the pups build him a mobility device.

programme.title: E703 - Pups Save An Antarctic Martian / Pups Save The Maze Explorers
programme.desc: Travelling Travis is on another great adventure when he lands in Antarctica but believes he's actually on Mars. // Mr. Porter and Alex go on a sightseeing hike but get trapped inside a huge maze! The Paw Patrol has to find the maze and their friends!

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: E117 - The Crew Builds An Observatory / The Crew Builds A Zipline
programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Return To Paradise
programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E275 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Firestorm
programme.desc: A hardboiled senior police inspector Lui, hot on the trails of a seasoned criminal Nam and his tight crew, determines to put an end to this madness...

programme.title: All's Well End's Well 2020
programme.desc: The Yau's brothers are a trio of scammers who make punishing baddies their mission. A misunderstanding leads them to fellow con artists the Lui's sisters, and they join hands to scam a notorious mob boss. Through a myriad of ingenious tricks and disguises, they bring the mobster to justice as romance blossoms swiftly...

programme.title: Train To Busan
programme.desc: A mysterious viral outbreak pushes Korea into a state of emergency! As an unidentified virus sweeps the country, Korean government declares martial law. Those on an express train to Busan, a city that has successfully fended off the viral outbreak, must fight for their own survival... 453 km from Seoul to Busan. The struggle to survive by those who have others to protect! Get on board to stay alive!

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: E3 - Carrot
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'carrot' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of carrots!

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E4 - Socks
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: E41 - The Grandparents Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: E13 - The Inventor's Spectacular Bridge
programme.desc: When the Rickety Old Bridge collapses, trapping Toby and Henrietta on the other side of the ravine, inventor Ruth is asked to build a new one.

programme.title: E40 - Duck Flies
programme.desc: Duck sees some flying, migrating ducks in the sky and decides he would like to try it too.

programme.title: E11 - I Could Be The Best Dancer In The Whole Entire World
programme.desc: From disco dancing frogs to skipping puffins and lions that love ballet, the talking animals discuss the best things about dancing.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E16 - The Philosophy Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels think about life's big questions, and gain their Philosophy badges.

programme.title: E10 - Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song 'All My Friends' to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: E9 - Leek
programme.desc: Leek won't let the conditions backstage stop him from singing 'Can't Hold Me Down'.

programme.title: E15 - Merry Sprouty Day Part 2

programme.title: E22 - It's Time To Ride A Bike
programme.desc: JoJo wishes Gran Gran could join her on a bike ride in the park, so Gran Gran decides to fix her old bicycle. After a good clean and fix-up, she's ready to ride!

programme.title: E110 - Rain
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and it rains. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch the flowers bloom. Another cloud appears and it rains pink, Tubby Custard!

programme.title: E4 - Snail
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'snail' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about snails!

programme.title: E8 - Messy Needs A Fur-Cut
programme.desc: When Messy accidentally sets Farmer Fuddle's sheep loose, he must help round them up in time for their annual wool shearing. But will Messy be brave enough to get a fur cut of his own?

programme.title: E24 - Swophenge
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: E15 - Butterflies

programme.title: Tiktoclock: Happy Hour Na
programme.desc: A game-variety show showcasing talents of Filipinos in singing, dancing and many more.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on a big animal adventure! First, the family takes a tour of the farm, where the farmer shows them all sorts of amazing animals. Then, Jill finds a little lost lamb, & with the help of her siblings, they adventure around the farm to find the lamb's mommy. The animal fun continues as the family visits the zoo to learn about opposites with help from the loud lions & quiet turtles!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E6 - Baby John Meets Our Local Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John is meeting our amazing local heroes! He discovers the important role of a police officer in the community & learns that they are here to help keep everyone safe. Then, he gets inspired by firefighters & forms his very own rescue team! The heroic day continues as the kids learn about all different kinds of jobs on career day at preschool & Baby John decides to take on a new challenge: becoming an ambulance driver!

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.desc: In France, not all primary school canteens offer the same quality. But thanks to citizen and political initiatives, food offerings are evolving. Example in Romainville... Also covered: the French anti food waste law; Q&A; when Japan inspires French pastry.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E11 - 征服百米雪坡 詮釋熱血團魂
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E7 - 嘉祺告白岑岑
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

My Family
programme.desc: The Ng family: Doctor Ng, Mrs. Ng, Ng Chee, Ng Lei and Ng Choi went to picnic happily. Hereon, different romances happened between them: First of all, Lei was attracted by Macdonna, a very sexy girl; Chee loved little Rambo who saved her from two 'teddy' boys; Choi loved her elder cousin who was graduated from a foreign university and had not found a job yet; Mrs. Ng decided to apply for the post of actress for a drama association. Billy, the director of the drama was the divorced father of little Rambo. He fell in love with Mrs. Ng at the first sight...
